How to Cash Out Telegram Stars for Real Money

A step-by-step guide to converting your Telegram Stars to USDT through StarStore — rates, wallets, timing, and answers to the most common questions.

StarStore Team·December 10, 2024·5 min read

Telegram does not provide a direct way to convert Stars into cash. StarStore is the bridge: we buy your Stars and pay you in USDT on the TON network, usually within hours of admin approval.

Step-by-step: selling your Stars

  1. Open @TgStarStore_bot in Telegram and launch the Mini App.
  2. Go to the Sell page.
  3. Enter the number of Stars you want to sell (50 minimum, 80,000 maximum per transaction).
  4. Paste your USDT TON-network wallet address. No memo or tag is needed.
  5. Confirm the order. You will receive an order ID immediately.
  6. Stars are held for 21 days for fraud protection. After the holding window, USDT is sent to your wallet.
  7. Send your order ID to the bot at any time to check the current status.

Why the 21-day hold?

The hold protects buyers, sellers, and the platform from chargebacks and recovered transactions on Telegram's side. It mirrors the policy Telegram applies to its own Stars revenue, and lets us keep fees low while paying out reliably.

Common questions

What rate do I get?

Live rates are shown in the Mini App before you confirm. They float with market USDT/Stars demand.

Can I use TRC-20 USDT?

Withdrawals are sent on the TON network. Make sure your address is a TON USDT (jetton) address — sending TRC-20 addresses will fail.

What if I send the wrong wallet?

Crypto transactions cannot be reversed. Always paste-and-verify your address before confirming.

For limits, holding rules, and referral/refund policy details, see the StarStore Knowledge Base.
